title: Datafold API Vocabulary
description: Domain terms and concepts from the Datafold data reliability platform API

domains.Data Diff: A comparison operation between two versions of a dataset that identifies added, removed, and changed rows and values
domains.Data Source: A configured database connection (Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, Postgres, etc.) used as input for diffs and monitors
domains.CI Run: A Continuous Integration pipeline run that triggers automated data diff validation before deployment
domains.Monitor: An automated data quality check that detects anomalies, schema changes, and data regressions on a schedule
domains.Audit Log: A record of user and system actions taken within the Datafold platform for compliance and traceability
domains.Column Lineage: A graph tracing how data flows and transforms through columns across tables and pipelines
domains.Data Regression: A degradation in data quality or schema detected by comparing pipeline output before and after a change
domains.Anomaly Detection: Automated identification of unexpected statistical deviations in data metrics over time
domains.BI Integration: Connection between Datafold and Business Intelligence tools (Looker, Tableau, etc.) for lineage tracking
domains.Data Diff Summary: An aggregate report of differences found between two table versions including row counts, schema changes, and value diffs
domains.Column Profile: Statistical summary of a column including null rates, cardinality, min/max values, and distribution
domains.Data Migration: The process of moving data between systems, validated by comparing source and target datasets with Datafold
domains.PR/MR Run: A Pull Request or Merge Request triggered CI run that validates data pipeline changes before merging code
